backend_selection_reason: selected backend family from resolved coverage regime Diploid and stage/tool compatibility
chunking_selection_reason: diploid defaults to larger chunks for throughput

decision_traces.why_stage_chosen: stage order comes from resolved coverage regime defaults unless operator requested subset

decision_traces.why_panel_chosen: panel selected by policy from species/build and license constraints

decision_traces.why_chunking_chosen: chunk windows/overlap derive from coverage regime and chunking knobs

decision_traces.reason: qc thresholds and overlap stats gate acceptance
regime-specific filtering/masking policy and UDG threshold profile

map_selection_reason: map compatibility enforced by species/build/contig digest (Homo sapiens/GRCh38)

stages.reason: coverage regime Diploid selected tool bcftools for vcf.prepare_reference_panel (coverage_regime_default)

calling_mode_contract.evidence_focus: called genotypes with diploid heterozygosity summaries

stages.reason: coverage regime Diploid selected tool bcftools for vcf.call_diploid (coverage_regime_default)
